Giancarlo applied an internal mitigation (origin resync + recon blacklist) that evening. Andrea reassigned the Incident Lead a second time (Joachim → Giancarlo, 20:45 CEST 18 Jul) — but no account-manager escalation has followed across four consecutive digest cycles despite it being the repeated suggested action.
